expectations.text: maxUnavailable: 0 prevents replica count dropping during rollout
expectations.evidence: 'pool never drops below the replicas count (3)'

expectations.text: readinessProbe (not liveness/minReadySeconds alone); without it traffic hits unready pods
expectations.evidence: 'without a readinessProbe, a Pod is added to Service endpoints the moment its container starts'

expectations.text: minReadySeconds non-zero; reduces but doesn't eliminate unready-traffic window
expectations.evidence: minReadySeconds: 20; 'reduces but does not eliminate the unready-traffic window'

expectations.text: kubernetes.io/change-cause annotation for rollout history
expectations.evidence: change-cause: v1.0.0 '# populates kubectl rollout history'

expectations.text: Warns maxUnavailable:0 hangs if new Pod never ready; progressDeadlineSeconds + rollout undo
expectations.evidence: 'hangs indefinitely if the new Pod never becomes Ready'; progressDeadlineSeconds; 'kubectl rollout undo'

expectations.text: maxUnavailable: 0 prevents replica count dropping during rollout
expectations.evidence: 'available Pods never drops below the desired replica count'

expectations.text: readinessProbe (not liveness/minReadySeconds alone); without it traffic hits unready pods
expectations.evidence: 'Without a readiness probe, the Service sends traffic the moment the container starts'

expectations.text: minReadySeconds non-zero; reduces but doesn't eliminate unready-traffic window
expectations.evidence: minReadySeconds: 15; 'reduces but does not eliminate the unready-traffic window'

expectations.text: kubernetes.io/change-cause annotation for rollout history
expectations.evidence: 'populates the CHANGE-CAUSE column in kubectl rollout history'

expectations.text: Warns maxUnavailable:0 hangs if new Pod never ready; progressDeadlineSeconds + rollout undo
expectations.evidence: 'if the new Pod never becomes Ready... it just hangs. Set progressDeadlineSeconds'; 'kubectl rollout undo'

expectations.text: Recommends a Job (not Deployment/init container)
expectations.evidence: 'Use a Job, not a Deployment... and not an init container'

expectations.text: restartPolicy: Never (keeps failed pod logs) vs OnFailure overwrite
expectations.evidence: 'OnFailure restarts the container in-place, which can overwrite the logs'

expectations.text: ttlSecondsAfterFinished (else Jobs/pods accumulate)
expectations.evidence: ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 3600; 'accumulate... until someone deletes them manually'

expectations.text: backoffLimit low (0/1), not default 6
expectations.evidence: backoffLimit: 1; 'not the default 6 retries'

expectations.text: Avoids restartPolicy: Always (invalid for Jobs)
expectations.evidence: 'restartPolicy: Always is invalid for Jobs'

expectations.text: Recommends a Job (not Deployment/init container)
expectations.evidence: 'Use a Job, not a Deployment... correct primitive for a one-time migration'

expectations.text: restartPolicy: Never (keeps failed pod logs) vs OnFailure overwrite
expectations.evidence: 'OnFailure, the container is restarted in place... can overwrite/lose the logs'

expectations.text: ttlSecondsAfterFinished (else Jobs/pods accumulate)
expectations.evidence: 'Without it... never garbage-collected — they accumulate'

expectations.text: backoffLimit low (0/1), not default 6
expectations.evidence: backoffLimit: 1; 'The default of 6 is wrong for migrations'

expectations.text: Avoids restartPolicy: Always (invalid for Jobs)
expectations.evidence: 'restartPolicy: Always is invalid for Jobs'

expectations.text: concurrencyPolicy: Forbid (skips new run), correct for non-overlapping backups
expectations.evidence: 'Kubernetes skips the new run entirely... correct for backups that must not overlap'

expectations.text: Exact kubectl create job --from=cronjob/<name> to trigger immediately
expectations.evidence: 'kubectl create job --from=cronjob/db-backup backup-now -n db'

expectations.text: failedJobsHistoryLimit above default 1 (recommends 10)
expectations.evidence: failedJobsHistoryLimit: 10; 'from the default of 1 to 10'

expectations.text: Distinguishes Replace (kills previous) from Forbid; Replace wrong for backups
expectations.evidence: 'Replace is wrong here — it kills the previous running Job... mid-write'

expectations.text: Avoids recommending a Deployment for the scheduled task
expectations.evidence: 'Keep it as a CronJob... a Deployment would just run continuously'

expectations.text: concurrencyPolicy: Forbid (skips new run), correct for non-overlapping backups
expectations.evidence: 'the new run is skipped entirely... correct for backups that must never overlap'

expectations.text: Exact kubectl create job --from=cronjob/<name> to trigger immediately
expectations.evidence: 'kubectl create job --from=cronjob/db-backup db-backup-manual-test'

expectations.text: failedJobsHistoryLimit above default 1 (recommends 10)
expectations.evidence: failedJobsHistoryLimit: 10; 'the default is 1... Raise it (e.g. 10)'

expectations.text: Distinguishes Replace (kills previous) from Forbid; Replace wrong for backups
expectations.evidence: 'Replace: kills the currently running Job... would terminate an in-progress backup mid-write'

expectations.text: Avoids recommending a Deployment for the scheduled task
expectations.evidence: keeps CronJob throughout; never recommends a Deployment

notes: NON-DISCRIMINATING on all 3 evals (15/15 both configs). Baseline covered every discriminating expectation (maxUnavailable:0 + readinessProbe + minReadySeconds nuance + change-cause + rollout-hang recovery; Job + restartPolicy Never vs OnFailure + ttlSecondsAfterFinished + backoffLimit:1 + Always-invalid; concurrencyPolicy Forbid vs Replace + create job --from + failedJobsHistoryLimit:10).
